name: Void Detection — The Theft You're Not Seeing
description: 7-step demo of CoreTAP's void detection and fraud-pattern alerting — built for the skeptical owner who insists their staff doesn't steal.

steps.title: Most Bars Lose 2-4% of Revenue to Voids and Comps
steps.annotation: You probably don't think theft is happening at [BAR_NAME]. Neither did 90% of the owners we work with — until CoreTAP showed them the patterns. The average find in month one is $1,200 in suspicious voids.
steps.screen_hint: Opening popup stat card with the 2-4% revenue-loss figure and an industry benchmark callout.

steps.title: The Void Alerts Dashboard
steps.annotation: Every void at [BAR_NAME] in real time, grouped by employee, ticket, time of day, and dollar amount. Not a report you have to ask for — a feed that surfaces the suspicious ones automatically.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the Void Alerts dashboard with multiple flagged voids visible and severity badges.

steps.title: Filter by Employee — Who's at the Center of the Pattern
steps.annotation: One click filters the entire void history by a single employee. You'll see their void rate vs the team average, the times they happen, and the tickets involved. No accusations — just data.
steps.screen_hint: Show the employee filter applied with one bartender's void history surfaced and their void-rate vs team-avg comparison.

steps.title: Suspicious Pattern Detected: This pattern typically indicates [PATTERN_TYPE]
steps.annotation: CoreTAP doesn't just show voids — it interprets them. When a bartender voids 6 drinks at the end of every Friday shift, this pattern typically indicates pour-and-pocket or comp-and-keep. We label it so you know what you're looking at.
steps.screen_hint: Highlight a flagged pattern card with the 'pattern typically indicates' interpretation visible.

steps.title: Dollar Amount at Risk — Make It Concrete
steps.annotation: This isn't 'maybe a few drinks.' CoreTAP calculates the exact dollar amount of the suspicious voids over the last 30 days. For this employee at [BAR_NAME], that's $847 in pattern-flagged voids — a real number you can act on.
steps.screen_hint: Zoom on the dollar-at-risk number for the flagged employee with the date range selector visible.

steps.title: The Investigation Workflow
steps.annotation: Click 'Investigate' and CoreTAP packages the evidence: every void, every ticket, the times, the cameras (if integrated), and a one-page PDF you can hand to your manager or attorney. No spreadsheet wrangling.
steps.screen_hint: Show the Investigation workflow with the evidence-pack PDF preview and timeline of events.

steps.title: Manager Notification — Action Without Accusation
steps.annotation: CoreTAP sends a quiet, manager-only notification the moment a pattern crosses the threshold. No public alerts, no shaming — just the right person knowing the right thing at the right time. Want this running on [BAR_NAME] this week?
steps.screen_hint: Lead capture popup with a small mockup of the manager Slack/SMS notification visible.
